_notice: Pinellas County asset layer. Schools, hospitals, fire/police stations use real coordinates from OpenStreetMap (April 2025). Red Cross sites and mobile home park attributes (unit counts, demographics) are synthetic but plausible. Phase 2 swaps synthetic fields for live ArcGIS/HIFLD/FL DOE feeds.

_schema.type: red_cross | school | fire_station | police_station | mobile_home_park | hospital
_schema.name: string (human-readable)
_schema.attrs: object (type-specific: enrollment, beds, units, capacity, etc.)
